creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kouichi,

you sent a tar file containing the new version of the port. Updates to
existing ports are generally expected/preferred to be sent in unified diff
format as produced by 'diff -u' or 'cvs diff -u', as that makes it easier
to see what changed in the port. Could you resend your update as a patch
in unified diff format?

Thanks and best regards,
Stefan
